titleStmt.title: SII 28.2: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 2. (A.R. No. 2 of 1913.) VEṄGANŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: ŚrI Raṅgadēva-mahārāyar Śaka 1591 Saumya, Chittirai 18, Daśami, Śadaiyam, Thursday-1669 A.D. April 15.

summary.p: Records that for the merit of Viṟuttāchala-raṭṭiyāṟ, son of the Vallakol Eṟama-raṭṭiyāṛ (see No. 1 above), the farmers, raṭṭis, husbandaman, koṭikkāṟkāṟar (betel-farmers ?), kōmuṭṭis, cheṭṭi-vaṟgattār, kaikkōḷar, chēṇiyar, chekkār, eḻuttukkāṟar and men who were paying taxes in cash (kāśvaṟgattār), all of them at Veṅganūr undertook to pay in kind where they were engaged in agriculture or in paṇam (where they were otherwise engaged) at rates specified for the worship and food offerings in the temple of Paḻamalaiṉātha-svāmiyār-Periyammai-nāchchiyār at Veṅkanūr. It is interesting that even army personnel rāṇuvattu-ppērum were enjoined to pay at a stipulated rate (?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . sostiśrī . śrī man
mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran śrī
cīraṅkatevamakārāyar piṟu
tivi rācciyam paṇṇi Aru
ḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam varuṣam
1000 5 100 9 10 1 Itaṉmeṟcel
lā niṉṟa cavumiyavaruṣam cittirai
mātam 8 10 2 tecamiyum cataiya naṣṣet
tiramum peṟṟa kuruvārattuṉāḷ
veṇkaṉūr paḻamalaiṉāta cuvāmiyār
periyammai ṉācciyār koyil pūcai
naivettiyattukku veṇkaṉūr kuṭi
yāṉavarkaḷ Uḷkaṭaiyākāka kaḷaraṭṭiyaḷ
veḷḷāḻar koṭikkāṟkāṟar periyam
maipāḷaiya mutalāṉa kuṭiyāṉa perum
komuṭṭiyaḷ ceṭṭivaṟtakar kaikkoḷar
ceṇiyar cekkār Eḻuttukkāṟar mutalāṉa
kācāya vaṟakattārum viṟumma mutalākiya cātiva

raiyuṇṭāṉa cātipalavakaipperumākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa
taṉmamāṉatu vallakol Eṟamaraṭṭiyār puttiraṉ
viṟuttācala raṭṭiyār puṇṇiyamāka
veṇkaṉūr vayaṟkāṭṭu nañcai nañcait
tarappuñcai mutalākiyatu Etu payireṟiṉā
ṉum viḷaiñca nilattukku 9 10 1 (1/2) 2 Āka kaṭṭaḷai
yiṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle vayaṟkāṭṭila nañcai puñcai kāy tā
ṉiya mutalāṉatum Uḷkkuṭi piṟavaṭaikāṟar muta
lāṉa perumkuḻiyoṉṟukku nāḻiyāka Aṉṉe
ram Aṉṉeram viḷaiñca tāṉṉiyam kuṭuttuvarak
kaṭavomākavum taṟikārar taṟikku Oru paṇamum
kācāyavaṟkattār talaikkaṭṭukku Oru paṇamumāka
varuṣāvati kuṭuttu varak kaṭavarākavum kaiccita mutalākiya
rāṇuvattupperum Intappaṭi kuṭuttuvarak kaṭavomākavum
Inta taṉmam cantirātittavaraiyum naṭattivarak kaṭavarākavum
Inta taṉmam paripālaṉam paṇṇi naṭattiṉa perum ceyta perum
coṭacatāṉa mutalākiya makātāṉamum keṅkai karaiyileyum
paḻamalaiṉātacuvāmiyār periyammaiṉācciyār caṉṉatiyileyum paṇ
ṇiṉapalaṉ Uṇṭāki Apiviṟtiyākakkaṭavarākavum Intattaṉmam
Umāpati raṭṭiyār ceyviccatu Itu koyiṟ kaṇakkappiḷḷai
Iṉiyaperumāḷ Eḻutiṉa Eḻuttu § kuruparattuṇai §
Digital edition of SII 28.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
